title: The Enchanted Sword
writer: Julián Pemartín, E. Piera, J. Selva
actors: Carme Contreras, Lolita Durán, Emilio Fábregas
plot: Garbancito is an orphan whose friends, Kiriqui and Chirili, are kidnapped by the giant Caramanca. To rescue his friends, Garbancito is assisted by a goat named Peregrina, his Fairy Godmother, and an enchanted sword.
